title: Is Rei poor
wikitext:
[]: Is Rei poor?             Quote Post by Kaworu-chan » Fri Dec 18, 2009 6:27 pm I know it sounds kind of dumb but I'm wondering if Rei is of low income. I mean come on! She lives in a run-down apartment, wears the same clothes everyday (her uniform) and I don't think she has that much food either. So please, anyone give me an opinion on this?

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Fri Dec 18, 2009 6:35 pm NERV spend all their budget on Evangelion repairs, not on salaries -- Misato is a high ranking officer, and still has trouble making her car payments.

[]:             Quote Post by Ironfoot » Fri Dec 18, 2009 6:38 pm Interesting thing to think about is if Shinji's apartment would've looked similar to Rei's had he not gone with Misato.

[]:             Quote Post by J_Faulkner » Fri Dec 18, 2009 6:38 pm I think you've just unearthed a really poignant issue that actually reveals a hidden message which nobody - to my knowledge - has ever thought of. Presumably, Gendo is the guardian of Rei, so he would be financing her existence through some arrangement with NERV. But, devastating, Gendo treats Rei like a caged animal. No wonder that she wallows in utter filth, probably wearing a pungent smell every day. However, let us think who Gendo's actual biological offspring is. That's right - it's Shinji! If Gendo treats Rei in squalid conditions, it is likely that he has also raised Shinji in a filthy environment full of germs and viruses. Or how about this : the squalid conditions of Rei Ayanami is symbolic for the psychological impoverishment under which Gendo has brought up Shinji. Now shall we see the symbolic meaning of Shinji Ikari falling on top of a naked Rei fresh from the shower! This is actually a foreshadowing of the end of the EoE: Shinji enters his personal mind/past, symbolically represented by Rei's apartment, and then attempts to achieve self-realization through a hieros-gamos event. However, the time is not yet right ... because Rei (the mother aspect of Shinji's mind) has yet to develop into a powerful god-concept.

[]:             Quote Post by GasmaskAvenger » Fri Dec 18, 2009 6:43 pm if you look at it that way, then there is more than meets the eye in Gendo & Rei's relationship like I previously theorized, one of the reasons why Rei is the way she is could be that some of the pills she's required to take supress her emotions (ala THX-1138) so she wouldn't turn on him I might obviously be wrong, but it never hurts to theorize

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Fri Dec 18, 2009 6:44 pm Rei probably lives where she does because she simply doesn't care about her personal well-being or safety considering she could always "be replaced". Gendo just needs Rei for his own purposes, Section 2 is always keeping an eye on the pilots, and if Rei really cared about her living environment, she probably could have lived in a spare pilot room at Nerv or something.

[]:             Quote Post by skikes » Fri Dec 18, 2009 6:49 pm .... Umm.... ...I don't even know how to answer this. Is this a serious question? Right uh... It's never stated whether or not eva pilots have a salary, Though i can only assume they do... and that its considerable. Given the fact they are all 14 its likely this is put into a trust fund. Commander Ikari is her guardian and im sure he is of significant wealth. Rei is a person necessity... If something is of only trivial value it means very little to her. Fashion, decor, these things aren't important. Her home is a reflection of her mind. Also in Japan your school uniform is worn with pride, on many occasions, not just for school... so this isn't that unusual. I'm sure Rei's living conditions have very little to do with Gendo. Im quite sure this is how Rei wants to live. They live apart as so not to complicate things. And i'm sure if Rei wanted to live in better surroundings Gendo would be more than willing to make it happen.

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Fri Dec 18, 2009 6:58 pm I you're going to analyze Rei's living space, you're also going to want to consider the lab she was born in: Shinji comments on it being just like Rei's apartment. In my opinion, she just doesn't care about how she lives and leaves her place in a wreck. When Shinji goes to Rei's apartment with Toji, he begins picking up garbage; it doesn't require money to pick up a few pieces of paper, so obviously Rei doesn't feel the need to. That said, she also wouldn't feel the need to vacuum, sweep, scrub or any of that fun stuff we so love to do in Spring. Imagine the horror her bathroom must be. Her living condition is a result of her not putting any effort into keeping it tidy, thus leaving it a wreck.

[]:             Quote Post by Lucretius » Fri Dec 18, 2009 7:09 pm What Sachi says. Rei doesn't care about luxuries or cleanliness. SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by tomrule123 » Fri Dec 18, 2009 7:34 pm Mr. Tines wrote: NERV spend all their budget on Evangelion repairs, not on salaries -- Misato is a high ranking officer, and still has trouble making her car payments.

[]:             Quote Post by Butterscotch » Fri Dec 18, 2009 7:41 pm J_Faulkner wrote: But, devastating, Gendo treats Rei like a caged animal.

[]:             Quote Post by skikes » Fri Dec 18, 2009 7:52 pm Butterscotch wrote: About Rei always wearing the school uniform wouldn't that be just because she is an anime/cartoon character and usually cartoon/anime characters always wear the same clothes, sure look at the Simpsons.

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Fri Dec 18, 2009 8:01 pm skikes wrote: These are the only things Rei is ever seen wearing throughout the entirety of NGE.

[]:             Quote Post by Butterscotch » Fri Dec 18, 2009 8:12 pm skikes wrote: Thats true... but all of the other characters are seen wearing various different outfits except for Rei who is only ever seen in uniforms. School uniform School Gym outfit School Bathing suit Plugsuit and... her birthday suit. These are the only things Rei is ever seen wearing throughout the entirety of NGE.

[]:             Quote Post by skikes » Fri Dec 18, 2009 8:12 pm Sachi wrote: skikes wrote: These are the only things Rei is ever seen wearing throughout the entirety of NGE.

[]:             Quote Post by child of Lilith » Fri Dec 18, 2009 8:22 pm Rei apartment is a mess because she just doesn’t care. If she wanted something better I’m sure Gendo would be more then willing to let her move someplace else, but to Rei any place will do. It is shone again and again during the series how little Rei cares for pretty much anything, so it should come as no surprise that such a hovel would be exceptable to her.

[]:             Quote Post by child of Lilith » Fri Dec 18, 2009 8:32 pm Butterscotch wrote: I forgot to mention that maybe Rei lives in poor living conditions because she is not human and maybe never learned about house keeping. She was never thought how to live as an actual human.

[]:             Quote Post by chaosakita » Fri Dec 18, 2009 10:41 pm Butterscotch wrote: I forgot to mention that maybe Rei lives in poor living conditions because she is not human and maybe never learned about house keeping. She was never thought how to live as an actual human.

[]:             Quote Post by Synapsid » Fri Dec 18, 2009 11:32 pm Mr. Tines wrote: NERV spend all their budget on Evangelion repairs, not on salaries -- Misato is a high ranking officer, and still has trouble making her car payments.

[]:             Quote Post by MatrixRefugee » Fri Dec 18, 2009 11:55 pm Add to this, Rei has the soul of Lilith kluged into a clone body; said soul might just not be fully conscious of average human living standards and thus luxuries might be quite foreign to her.
